title: MGP Runtime Capabilities
description: Client/runtime-side capabilities that influence negotiated MGP behavior.

supports_consumable_text.description: Whether the runtime can directly consume the always-present consumable_text field as a prompt-safe view.

supports_redaction_info.description: Whether the runtime can correctly interpret redaction metadata.

supports_mixed_return_modes.description: Whether the runtime can handle mixed return_mode values in one search result set.

supports_partial_failure.description: Whether the runtime can inspect and react to partial_failure payloads.

supports_search_explanations.description: Whether the runtime can interpret search explanation fields.

supports_prompt_view.description: Whether the runtime can correctly consume the response-side prompt-safe representations already defined by MGP, such as consumable_text and governed return modes.

supports_async_operations.description: Whether the runtime can participate in future async task flows.

supports_subscriptions.description: Whether the runtime can participate in future subscription-based flows.

preferred_return_modes.description: Return modes the runtime prefers to receive when multiple representations are possible.

supported_profiles.description: Protocol profiles the runtime can understand.

accepted_transport_profiles.description: Transport profiles the runtime is willing to use.
